description_long: This rifle features a modern, tactical design with a predominantly matte black finish and angular contours. The body is constructed from what appears to be a combination of metal and polymer, with visible rails and textured grip areas for enhanced handling. The barrel is long and slender, extending from a robust receiver, and the stock is compact, possibly integrated or minimalistic, with no visible extension. There are several functional components, including a trigger, magazine well, and a charging handle, as well as a sighting system mounted on the top rail. Small red accents are present on some controls, adding visual contrast and indicating interactive parts. The overall build suggests a lightweight, maneuverable weapon suitable for urban tactical scenarios.
description: A sleek, modern black rifle with angular lines, a long barrel, and compact stock, featuring red-accented controls and a top-mounted sight.
description_view_0: Front view showing the narrow muzzle, compact stock, and top sight alignment.
description_view_1: Side profile highlighting the long barrel, angular receiver, and visible control levers.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the receiver, stock, and charging handle.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile with details of the barrel, receiver, and additional control elements.
